hero.title: Massage at Your Home
hero.subtitle: Zurich Lake Region
hero.description: I come to you with a professional massage table and all necessary equipment. Relax in your familiar surroundings while I provide you with a first-class massage – without any commute or parking hassles.

services.title: Massage Services
services.subtitle: Services
services.description: Discover our professional massage treatments tailored to your specific needs. From classical relaxation to targeted sports massage – I bring the perfect treatment to your home.

swedish.title: Swedish Massage
swedish.description: Swedish massage is a classic therapeutic treatment aimed at deep relaxation, recovery, and harmonizing the body. Gentle, rhythmic techniques combined with deeper pressure help release accumulated tension, improve circulation, and restore the body's natural state of balance.

classical.title: Classical Massage
classical.description: Ideal when your body needs rest. Gentle yet deep movements relieve tension, improve circulation, and restore lightness. After a session, you'll feel as if you've shed a few pounds of fatigue – straighter back, freer breathing, brighter mood. Classical massage suits everyone who wants to restore energy and feel the balance between body and mind.

sports.title: Sports Massage
sports.description: For those who live actively: sports, physical work, intensive training. This massage helps muscles recover faster, release tension, regain flexibility and energy. It improves endurance and makes the body more alive and responsive. Ideal before or after workouts – so you don't just train, but enjoy it.

anticellulite.title: Anti-Cellulite Massage
anticellulite.description: Not just fighting cellulite – it's a real upgrade for your body. Intensive techniques activate metabolism, improve lymph flow, and remove excess fluid. Skin becomes smoother, firmer, and more alive. After just a few sessions, you'll feel lightness, firmness, and confidence in your body.

pregnancy.title: Pregnancy Massage
pregnancy.description: Gentle, caring, safe. Helps relieve tension in back and legs, reduce swelling, and improve sleep. Everything is done gently, in a comfortable position, using natural oils. This massage is not just body care, but a moment of peace and connection with your baby.

children.title: Children's Massage
children.description: Light, kind, and beneficial. Helps children develop muscles, improves sleep, digestion, and mood. Performed in a playful manner – without pain or fear. This massage is not only health care, but also a way to give children a feeling of love and safety.

cupping.title: Cupping Massage
cupping.description: A powerful tool for recovery and vitality. Vacuum cups activate circulation, improve metabolism, and effectively fight cellulite. Also excellent for back pain and muscle tension. After the treatment, the body feels light, and skin becomes firm and elastic.

relaxation.title: Relax Massage
relaxation.description: If you just want to switch off your mind and feel fatigue disappear – this is what you need. Smooth, rhythmic movements, pleasant aromas, and complete relaxation. Just one hour – and the body fills with calm, thoughts become clearer. The perfect way to let go of everything unnecessary and restore inner harmony.

pricing.title: Pricing & Terms
pricing.note: Cupping therapy can be added to any massage.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Your Professional Massage Therapist
about.story: My journey to becoming a massage therapist is unique. As a former Olympic gymnast for Ukraine and circus artist, I've spent my life understanding the human body at the highest level. In 2026, I became a participant and prize-winner of the 5th Swiss Massage Championship, taking 1st place in the Swedish Massage category. Through years of athletic performance, I learned firsthand what muscles need to recover, how to prevent injuries, and the importance of proper body care. This deep, personal knowledge of the body's mechanics now informs every massage I give. I bring the discipline of an athlete and the precision of a performer to help you feel pain-free and completely relaxed. Available in German, English, and Russian.

However, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.

dataProtection.intro: The protection of your personal data is very important to us. In this data protection declaration, we inform you about the processing of personal data when using our website.

responsible.title: Responsible Party

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: When you contact us via WhatsApp, email or phone, we collect and process the personal data you provide (name, contact details, message content) solely for the purpose of processing your inquiry and booking appointments. This data will not be shared with third parties.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to information, correction, deletion, restriction of processing, data portability and objection to the processing of your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at {email}.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about data protection, please contact us at: {email}

items.question: How does mobile massage work?
items.answer: I come directly to your home with a professional massage table and all necessary equipment. You don't need to prepare anything – just relax in your familiar surroundings.

items.question: What do I need to prepare?
items.answer: You only need 2 large towels and one small towel. I bring the rest: massage table, massage oils, and all necessary materials. You need a room with about 3x3 meters of space.

items.question: How long does a session last?
items.answer: A standard massage session lasts 60 minutes. I also offer extended 90-minute sessions. Additionally, I plan 10-15 minutes for setup and breakdown.

items.question: What equipment do you bring?
items.answer: I bring a professional, adjustable massage table, fresh towels, high-quality massage oils, relaxation music, and cupping glasses if needed. You don't need to provide anything.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: I offer mobile massage throughout the Zürichsee region, including Zürich, Schwyz, Luzern, Zug, Aargau, and Rapperswil (St. Gallen). Contact me for specific locations.

items.question: How do I book an appointment?
items.answer: It's easy! Click any 'Book Now' button and you'll be directed to WhatsApp. Alternatively, you can call me at +41 79 849 92 74.

items.question: What's your cancellation policy?
items.answer: I ask for at least 24 hours notice for cancellations. Short-notice cancellations may incur a fee. Rescheduling is usually free of charge.

items.question: Do you have professional certification?
items.answer: Yes! I'm a professionally trained massage therapist. Additionally, I was an Olympic gymnast for Ukraine, which gives me deep understanding of body mechanics and sports injuries.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: I accept cash payment and TWINT. Payment is made after the massage.

items.question: Is it safe to have a massage therapist at home?
items.answer: Absolutely! I'm a professional, certified therapist with years of experience. Many clients appreciate the comfort and privacy of home massage. You can also check my reviews and references.

items.quote: D'Sportmassage het mer mega gholfe! Oleg weiss genau, wo d'Verspannige sitze und wie mer die löst. I ha mi danach wie neugebore gfühlt!
items.author: Anna K.

items.quote: Die Massage war genau das Richtige nach dem Training. Oleg versteht seinen Job wirklich – als ehemaliger Olympia-Turner weiß er, worauf es ankommt.
items.author: Thomas M.

items.quote: The convenience of having a professional massage at home is incredible. Everything was perfectly prepared, and I felt completely relaxed afterwards.
items.author: Sarah J.

items.quote: Олег - настоящий профессионал! Спортивный массаж помог мне восстановиться после травмы. Очень удобно, что он приезжает на дом.
items.author: Дмитрий П.

items.quote: Чудова розслаблююча масажна терапія! Олег дуже уважний і професійний. Рекомендую всім, хто шукає якісний масаж.
items.author: Оксана В.

smc1stPlace.title: 1st Place — Swedish Massage
smc1stPlace.description: Awarded 1st Place in the Swedish Massage category at the Swiss Massage Championship 2026 in Zurich, Switzerland.
smc1stPlace.aboutText: The Swiss Massage Championship is organized by the International Association of Facial Massage and Wellness (IAFMW) and the IMA Association. The competition brings together the best massage therapists who demonstrate their skills before an international jury. The 1st place confirms the highest level of professionalism and expertise in Swedish Massage.

meta.title: 1st Place Swiss Massage Championship 2026 | olegmassage.com
meta.description: 1st Place in the Swedish Massage category at the Swiss Massage Championship 2026 in Zurich. Certified massage therapist with Olympic background.

meta.title: Swedish Massage Zurich | Deep Relaxation and Recovery
meta.description: Professional Swedish massage at your home in Zurich. Deep relaxation, recovery, improved circulation. 120 CHF (60 min) • 160 CHF (90 min). Book now!

benefits.title: Benefits of Swedish Massage
benefits.1: Deep relaxation of muscles and nervous system
benefits.2: Improved blood circulation and tissue nourishment
benefits.3: Reduced stress and inner tension levels
benefits.4: Improved sleep quality and overall well-being

whatToExpect.title: What to Expect from a Session
whatToExpect.description: Swedish massage combines gentle, rhythmic techniques with deeper pressure on problem areas. The treatment is ideal for people with stressful lifestyles, sedentary work, and anyone seeking quality recovery and regular body care.

idealFor.title: Who is Swedish Massage for?
idealFor.description: Ideal for people with stressful lifestyles, sedentary office work, or chronic tension. Especially recommended for those seeking regular body care and recovery. Also perfect as an introduction for massage beginners.

frequency.title: How often should you get Swedish Massage?
frequency.description: For optimal results, I recommend 1-2 sessions per week over 4-6 weeks. For maintenance, one session every 2-4 weeks is sufficient. For acute issues, a more intensive frequency may be beneficial.

preparation.title: Before and after tips
preparation.description: Drink plenty of water before your massage. Avoid heavy meals at least one hour before. After the massage: rest for 10-15 minutes, drink plenty of water, and avoid intensive physical activity for the rest of the day.

meta.title: Classical Massage Zurich | Professional Relaxing Massage Therapy
meta.description: Professional classical massage at your home in Zurich. Relieves tension, improves circulation, restores energy. 100 CHF (60 min) • 150 CHF (90 min). Book now!

benefits.title: Benefits of Classical Massage
benefits.1: Relieves muscle tension and spasms
benefits.2: Improves blood circulation and lymph flow
benefits.3: Promotes deep relaxation
benefits.4: Restores energy and vitality

whatToExpect.title: What to Expect from a Session
whatToExpect.description: Classical massage includes gentle yet deep techniques that work all major muscle groups. The session begins with warming up the tissues and gradually transitions to deeper techniques. Professional oils selected for your skin type are used.

idealFor.title: Who is Classical Massage for?
idealFor.description: Suitable for almost everyone: from office workers with back pain to seniors with limited mobility. Particularly effective for general fatigue, tension headaches, and sleep problems.

frequency.title: How often should you get Classical Massage?
frequency.description: For prevention, I recommend one session every 2-3 weeks. For chronic issues, 1-2 sessions per week for 4-8 weeks is ideal. The frequency can then be reduced to monthly.

preparation.title: Before and after tips
preparation.description: Come relaxed — avoid stress and rushing before your session. Wear comfortable clothing. After the session: take it easy, drink water, and take a warm bath to enhance the effects.

meta.title: Sports Massage Zurich | Professional Recovery for Athletes
meta.description: Sports massage at your home in Zurich. Enhances recovery, releases tension, increases flexibility. Perfect before and after training. 140 CHF (60 min).

benefits.title: Benefits of Sports Massage
benefits.1: Accelerates muscle recovery after training
benefits.2: Improves flexibility and range of motion
benefits.3: Prevents injuries and overuse
benefits.4: Enhances athletic performance

whatToExpect.title: What to Expect from a Session
whatToExpect.description: Sports massage combines deep tissue techniques with targeted work on problem areas. As a former Olympic gymnast, I understand the needs of active individuals. The treatment is adapted to your training schedule – whether for preparation or recovery.

idealFor.title: Who is Sports Massage for?
idealFor.description: For athletes of all levels — from hobby sportspeople to professionals. Also ideal for those with physically demanding jobs. Particularly effective for muscle soreness, limited mobility, and injury prevention.

frequency.title: How often should you get Sports Massage?
frequency.description: Before competitions: 2-3 days before. After intensive training: within 24-48 hours. Regular athletes benefit from weekly sessions. During rest periods, every 2-3 weeks is sufficient.

preparation.title: Before and after tips
preparation.description: Don't schedule your massage right after training — wait at least 2 hours. Tell me about any current injuries or pain. After the massage: light stretching and plenty of water. Avoid intensive training for 24 hours.

meta.title: Anti-Cellulite Massage Zurich | Effective Body Firming
meta.description: Anti-cellulite massage at your home in Zurich. Activates metabolism, improves skin appearance, firms tissue. 100 CHF (45 min). Visible results after just a few sessions. Book now!

benefits.title: Benefits of Anti-Cellulite Massage
benefits.1: Activates metabolism and fat breakdown
benefits.3: Firms and smooths the skin
benefits.4: Visibly reduces cellulite and water retention

whatToExpect.title: What to Expect from a Session
whatToExpect.description: Intensive, dynamic techniques work on deep tissue layers. The massage stimulates lymph flow and helps the body eliminate excess fluid. You'll feel a sense of lightness after the very first session. For optimal results, I recommend a course of 8-12 sessions.

idealFor.title: Who is Anti-Cellulite Massage for?
idealFor.description: For women and men who want to improve their skin texture, reduce water retention, and firm their body. Especially effective combined with healthy nutrition and regular exercise.

frequency.title: How often should you get Anti-Cellulite Massage?
frequency.description: For visible results, I recommend a course of 8-12 sessions, 2-3 times per week. Then for maintenance, 1-2 sessions per month. Initial improvements are often noticeable after just 3-4 sessions.

preparation.title: Before and after tips
preparation.description: Drink plenty of water before and after treatment — this supports detoxification. Avoid caffeine and alcohol on the day of your massage. Regular exercise between sessions significantly enhances the effect.

meta.title: Pregnancy Massage Zurich | Safe Relaxation for Expectant Mothers
meta.description: Gentle pregnancy massage at your home in Zurich. Relieves back pain, reduces swelling, improves sleep. 120 CHF (60 min). Safe from the 2nd trimester onwards.

benefits.title: Benefits of Pregnancy Massage
benefits.1: Relieves back and leg pain
benefits.3: Improves sleep quality and well-being
benefits.4: Promotes relaxation and connection with baby

whatToExpect.title: What to Expect from a Session
whatToExpect.description: All techniques are performed gently and in a comfortable side-lying position. I use special cushions for optimal comfort and natural oils without artificial additives. The massage is safe from the second trimester onwards and helps you enjoy this special time in a relaxed way.

idealFor.title: Who is Pregnancy Massage for?
idealFor.description: For expectant mothers from the second trimester onwards. Helps with typical pregnancy complaints such as back pain, swollen legs, and sleep problems. Please consult your doctor first if you have a high-risk pregnancy.

frequency.title: How often should you get Pregnancy Massage?
frequency.description: In the second trimester: every 2-3 weeks. In the third trimester: weekly if desired. The massage is individually adapted to the respective stage of pregnancy.

preparation.title: Before and after tips
preparation.description: Let me know which week of pregnancy you are in. Eat a light snack before the massage. I use special cushions for optimal comfort in the side-lying position. Rest after the massage.

meta.title: Children's Massage Zurich | Loving Health Care
meta.description: Children's massage at your home in Zurich. Promotes healthy development, improves sleep and digestion. Playful and gentle. For babies and children of all ages.

benefits.title: Benefits of Children's Massage
benefits.1: Supports muscle and bone development
benefits.3: Strengthens immune system and health
benefits.4: Promotes emotional bonding and security

whatToExpect.title: What to Expect from a Session
whatToExpect.description: The massage is performed playfully and with great care. Everything happens at a pace that is comfortable for your child – without pressure or stress. You can be present during the session and also learn the techniques yourself to apply them at home.

idealFor.title: Who is Children's Massage for?
idealFor.description: For babies from 3 months and children of all ages. Especially helpful for sleep problems, digestive issues, motor development delays, and for hyperactive children who need relaxation.

frequency.title: How often should Children's Massage be done?
frequency.description: For babies: 2-3 short sessions per week. For older children: 1-2 times per week. I also teach you techniques that you can use at home to continue the massage between appointments.

preparation.title: Before and after tips
preparation.description: Make sure your child is not hungry or overtired. The massage takes place in a warm, quiet room. You can be present throughout the session. Bring your child's favorite toy.

meta.title: Cupping Massage Zurich | Traditional Therapy for Modern Problems
meta.description: Cupping massage at your home in Zurich. Relieves back pain, fights cellulite, improves circulation. Can be added to any massage (15 min).

benefits.title: Benefits of Cupping Massage
benefits.1: Activates intensive circulation and regeneration
benefits.2: Relieves chronic back and neck pain
benefits.3: Effectively fights cellulite and water retention
benefits.4: Releases deep muscle tension and trigger points

whatToExpect.title: What to Expect from a Session
whatToExpect.description: Vacuum cupping glasses create negative pressure that strongly stimulates circulation and releases tension. The method may leave marks (red circles) that disappear after a few days. Cupping can be performed as a standalone treatment or as a complement to other massages.

idealFor.title: Who is Cupping Massage for?
idealFor.description: For people with chronic back and neck pain, muscle tension, and circulation problems. Also effective for cellulite and general detoxification. Not suitable for those on blood thinners or with sensitive skin.

frequency.title: How often should you get Cupping Massage?
frequency.description: As a complement to massage: possible at every session. As a standalone treatment: every 1-2 weeks. The marks (red circles) disappear after 3-7 days — plan accordingly.

preparation.title: Before and after tips
preparation.description: Drink plenty of water before and after treatment. Be aware that cupping can leave temporary discolorations — wear covering clothing if needed. Avoid hot showers for 24 hours after treatment.

meta.title: Relaxation Massage Zurich | Pure Recovery for Body and Mind
meta.description: Relaxation massage at your home in Zurich. Stress relief, mental calm, complete relaxation. Perfect after a long day. 120 CHF (60 min) • 160 CHF (90 min).

benefits.title: Benefits of Relaxation Massage
benefits.1: Reduces stress and mental strain
benefits.3: Brings inner peace and clarity
benefits.4: Strengthens emotional well-being

whatToExpect.title: What to Expect from a Session
whatToExpect.description: Flowing, rhythmic movements with pleasant pressure create an atmosphere of complete relaxation. I use aromatic oils and gentle music to engage all senses. After an hour, you'll feel refreshed, centered, and ready to experience the world with renewed energy.

idealFor.title: Who is Relaxation Massage for?
idealFor.description: For everyone who wants to reduce stress and find inner peace. Especially recommended after long work weeks, when at risk of burnout, for sleep disorders, or simply as a regular self-care ritual.

frequency.title: How often should you get Relaxation Massage?
frequency.description: For maximum anti-stress effect: weekly or biweekly. As a self-care ritual: monthly. Many clients experience the best results with a regular routine.

preparation.title: Before and after tips
preparation.description: Give yourself time after the massage — don't schedule stressful appointments afterwards. Dim the lights and play soft music to enhance the atmosphere. Put your phone on silent and enjoy complete peace.
